The proposed share sales introduce an element of supply overhang to the market, which can exert downward pressure on the stock price by increasing the float of tradable shares. Investors will be monitoring the execution and size of these sales, as they could impact short-term momentum and investor sentiment, overshadowing any potential positive news.
